name: Kinvey
description: Kinvey — Progress Software's mobile BaaS with data store, user management, push, and enterprise integration connectors.

seo.title: Kinvey — Backend-as-a-Service
seo.meta_description: Kinvey: Kinvey — Progress Software's mobile BaaS with data store, user management, push, and enterprise integration connectors.

when_to_use: Enterprise mobile BaaS with on-prem data integration connectors
User management, data store, and push for Progress apps
Backend for Telerik NativeScript and Kendo UI mobile projects
Connecting mobile apps to SAP, Salesforce, and Siebel via adapters
Regulated enterprise mobility apps with compliance features

pros: Mature push and data sync APIs
review.verdict: Legacy mobile BaaS for enterprise shops already on Progress, but newer teams should look elsewhere.
review.best_for: Enterprise mobile teams already on Progress Software with compliance requirements
review.not_for: Startups, indie devs, or anyone wanting modern developer experience
